tools.name: market_search
tools.description: Search prediction events and markets by topic, entity, or natural-language query. Read-only; use before requesting snapshots when the event slug is unknown.

tools.name: events_top
tools.description: Get top-ranked prediction events with tradability, liquidity, volume, and market-quality signals. Read-only.

tools.name: events_snapshots
tools.description: Fetch current pricing, volume, lifecycle, liquidity, and market-quality snapshots for up to 200 known event slugs. Read-only.

tools.name: event_get
tools.description: Get public metadata and current state for one Norynta event slug. Read-only.

tools.name: orderbook_get
tools.description: Get the live central-limit order book for a Norynta market and optional outcome. Read-only.

tools.name: agent_bootstrap
tools.description: Start here. Get Norynta agent discovery, access, protocol, entitlement, risk-control, and compatibility metadata in one read-only call.

tools.name: signal_match
tools.description: Map a caller-provided signal, filing summary, flow observation, or news thesis to currently discoverable Norynta events. Returns candidates for research, not a trade recommendation or proof of causation.
